inputs.fcf_source: Standalone reference only: FY2025 OCF $4.306B less capex $5.929B = negative owner cash; normalized $0.45/sh uses adj. EBITDA less maintenance capex [Assumption] — not stance gate while merger pending
inputs.adjusted_ebitda_source: FY2025 segment Adjusted EBITDA sum $2,890M (Renewables $932M, Utilities $863M, Energy Infrastructure $1,130M, New Energy Technologies $(35)M) per 10-K FY2025
inputs.merger_buyer: GIP + EQT Infrastructure VI (Horizon Parent, L.P.)
inputs.normalization_note: March 1, 2026 merger agreement at $15.00 cash supersedes standalone Lawrence path for stance gate. J.P. Morgan fairness range $11.31–$16.39/sh (DEF 14A proxy materials, June 2026).

bear.notes: Regulatory delay past June 2027 outside date; spread widens; partial deal risk

base.notes: Merger closes late 2026 or early 2027 per 8-K 2026-03-02; $15.00 cash consideration

sotp_build.notes: Merger closes late 2026 or early 2027 per 8-K 2026-03-02; $15.00 cash consideration

bull.notes: Accelerated regulatory approvals; close by year-end 2026

standalone_reference.notes: Informational only while take-private pending; heavy growth capex keeps reported FCF negative

merger_close.notes: Primary event path; no go-shop period identified in merger agreement

deal_break.notes: Bear sensitivity: buyer termination or regulatory failure; parent termination fee up to ~$588M [Assumption on equity impact]

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Regulated utility rate base and project finance on balance sheet; no land-at-zero pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 12.0 GW contracted renewables backlog not yet operating (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: New Energy Technologies SBU Adjusted EBITDA $(35)M FY2025

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: 4.0 GW new renewables contracts signed in 2025; backlog 12.0 GW with signed PPAs

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Fluence Energy stake marked via public FLNC; Uplight/Maximo private tech investments per 10-K

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: March 1, 2026 GIP/EQT cash merger at $15.00/sh; expected close late 2026 / early 2027

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: AES Ohio 2.1 GW data-center load growth and 310 MW retail supply contracts (424B5 March 2025)

stance_proposal.override_reason: Merger arb base return near but below ~15% bar; regulatory timeline and spread compression keep watch until clearer entry or deal certainty

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Standalone: renewables backlog conversion and AES Ohio data-center load; merger event supersedes for stance.
growth_explanation.years_6_10: Standalone: regulated utility rate-base growth at AES Indiana/AES Ohio.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 backlog and segment EBITDA; 424B5 March 2025 strategic highlights
